LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.descript: Ring for matforsyninger fra Brotherhood of Steel.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.label: BoS Food Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Tech_Resource: Ring for Brotherhood of Steel tekniske ressurser og komponenter.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Uniforms.desc: Ring for Brotherhood of Steel standard uniformer.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.descr: Ring for Brotherhood of Steel standard våpen.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.label: BoS Weapon Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Power_Armor_Drop.desc: Ring for utplassering av Enclave power panser.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Supply_Drop.descripti: Ring for en Enclave-forsyningsdråpe som inneholder nødvendigheter for overlevelse.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Supply_Drop.label: Enclave Supply Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Technology_Drop.descr: Ring for avansert teknologi og komponenter fra Enclave-butikker.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Technology_Drop.label: Enclave Technology Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Weapons_Drop.descript: Ring for avanserte enklavevåpen inkludert plasmavåpen.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Weapons_Drop.label: Enclave Weapons Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Ranger_Supply_Drop_Vetera: Ring for NCR Ranger Veteran Armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Supply_Drop_Food.label: NCR Food Drop
